content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed all code changes across br_health.rs (new), br_process.rs, mod.rs, project.rs, run.rs, success_reconciliation.rs, service.rs, and cli.rs. The implementation is well-designed and thorough: sync_import support, sync_if_dirty convenience, JSONL health checks with conflict marker detection, pre-operation safety gates at all mutation entry points, crash recovery via per-adapter journal records under file-level locking, and comprehensive test coverage (health checks, dirty-flag lifecycle, cross-adapter recovery, race serialization, gitignore verification). No critical or high-severity issues found. Minor observations: check_available_with_timeout uses wait_with_output after try_wait (safe in practice on modern Rust due to internal status caching but technically fragile per stdlib docs), and the synchronous br version probe in check_beads_health can briefly block the async executor in the happy path (~100ms). Both are low-severity and consistent with existing codebase patterns.

## Amendments

None.
